studies.title: Study Details | NCT05156320 | Efficacy and Safety of Apitegromab in ...
studies.abstract: This Phase 3 trial (Study SRK-015-003) was conducted in patients ≥2 years old at Screening, who were previously diagnosed with later-onset spinal muscular atrophy (SMA) (i.e., Type 2 and Type 3 SMA) and were receiving an approved survival motor neuron (SMN) upregulator therapy (i.e., either nusinersen or risdiplam), to confirm the efficacy and safety of apitegromab as an adjunctive therapy ...
studies.brief_summary: This Phase 3 trial (Study SRK-015-003) was conducted in patients ≥2 years old at Screening, who were previously diagnosed with later-onset spinal muscular atrophy (SMA) (i.e., Type 2 and Type 3 SMA) and were receiving an approved survival motor neuron (SMN) upregulator therapy (i.e., either nusinersen or risdiplam), to confirm the efficacy and safety of apitegromab as an adjunctive therapy ...

studies.title: PDF Official title: Napping, Sleep, Cognitive Decline and Risk of Alzheimer ...
studies.abstract: Somryst delivers digital therapeutic content, and can be used on a mobile device, such as a smartphone or tablet. During each session, you will engage with the Somryst app (for about 30 minutes) and make daily entries into a sleep diary.
studies.brief_summary: Somryst delivers digital therapeutic content, and can be used on a mobile device, such as a smartphone or tablet. During each session, you will engage with the Somryst app (for about 30 minutes) and make daily entries into a sleep diary.

studies.title: PDF Official title: Napping, Sleep, Cognitive Decline and Risk of Alzheimer ...
studies.abstract: Somryst is a 9-week program that delivers digital CBT-I therapeutic content, and can be used on a mobile device, such as a smartphone or tablet. CBT-I is a neurobehavioral treatment which focuses on addressing the maladaptive behaviors, routines, and dysfunctional thoughts that perpetuate sleep problems, regardless of the cause of sleep problems.
